privacy.intro1: The operator of this website takes the protection of your personal data very seriously. I treat your personal data confidentially and in accordance with statutory data protection regulations and this privacy policy.
privacy.intro2: Our website can usually be used without providing personal data. Where personal data (such as name, address, or email addresses) is collected on my site, this is done on a voluntary basis wherever possible. This data will not be passed on to third parties without your express consent.
privacy.intro3: Please note that data transmission over the Internet (e.g. when communicating by email) may have security gaps. Complete protection of data against access by third parties is not possible.
privacy.serverLogFilesIntro: The provider of the pages automatically collects and stores information in so-called server log files that your browser transmits to us automatically. These are:

serverLogFilesItems.host: Host name of the accessing computer

privacy.serverLogFilesOutro: This data cannot be assigned to specific individuals. This data is not merged with other data sources. I reserve the right to check this data retrospectively if I become aware of concrete evidence of unlawful use.
